intended_use: The VX1+ assists operators in the real-time manual or automatic annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiti
intended_use_full: The VX1+ assists operators in the real-time manual or automatic annotation of 3D anatomical and electrical maps of human atria for the presence of multipolar intra-cardiac atrial electrograms exhibiting spatiotemporal dispersion during atrial fibrillation or atrial tachycardia.
ground_truth: Unlimited-time expert visual analysis (as referenced from VX1's Reader Study)
other_metrics: The Reader Study from VX1's predicate submission (K201298) was replayed with VX1+ dispersion algorithm; results indicate VX1+ reliably assists operators in detection and auto-tagging with no associated additional risks or procedure time
